text: Hello, I'm having some issues with my device. It seems to be malfunctioning and I can't pinpoint exactly what's wrong. I tried resetting it multiple times, but it just won't respond as expected. Can you help?
I'm really frustrated! My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. It just shuts down and I don't know why.
i can't log in. my account is gone? what happened?
I can't believe this! My app keeps crashing when I try to open it, and it's so frustrating! I thought everything was fine before. Please help!
I really hope someone can help me understand why my billing seems so off this month. It's been stressing me out and I just can't find clarity.
Could you please clarify the specific requirements to access your premium features? I seem to be missing some information.

I wish to express my dissatisfaction regarding an order I placed recently. It has taken longer than I anticipated, and I have not received any updates. Could you please provide clarification on this matter?
I tried to cancel my subscription but it still charged me. Can I get a refund?
I seem to be having an issue with my account. I'm not sure what the problem is, but it's preventing me from accessing certain features. Can you assist?

I ordered a beautiful vase that was supposed to come in 2 days, but it's now been over a week! I even planned a dinner party to show it off and now I just have a sad empty table. What's going on? Also, I saw on your website that you have some sales on other items, but I can't focus on that until I get my vase. Can you please help?
hey, umm, I thought I signed up for the monthly thingy, but just saw a charge for like the full year? what’s going on?? I need like, a refund or something.
I don't understand why my order says it was delivered but I never got it. Can you explain how that happened?
My app crashes when I try to log in, but I can log in on the website just fine. What's wrong with it?
I can't access my account. Something's wrong with my login.

I’ve been trying to access my account for days now, and it keeps saying my password is incorrect, even though I’m sure I’m entering it right. Plus, I’m not even sure if my account is locked or something weird is going on. Can someone please help? I really need to get into my account. This is so frustrating because I thought I changed my password to something I could easily remember, but now it feels like there’s just a contradiction happening because it shouldn't be like this. I'm confused if it's a system error or my mistake.
I have recently updated my payment information, but I still see charges related to my old card. Can you confirm which card is currently being billed? I believe there might be a mistake here.
